page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.6xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates solid compute capabilities, achieving a Passmark CPU score of 25,430.3 and a multi-core stress-ng CPU performance score of 24,960.98. Memory performance is a notable strength, with a Passmark memory score categorized in the top 25% at 2,766.23, alongside a cached read-only small block memory bandwidth of 1,393.48 GB/sec. For database and web operations, the server handles 23.87 million Redis SET operations per second and delivers a static web serving throughput of 18.51 GB/sec.

The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. However, the lack of local storage and GPU hardware limits its utility for large-scale data storage or hardware-accelerated machine learning. It is well-positioned for workloads such as software compilation, text and image processing, web serving, and medium-scale language model inference, where its dedicated Intel Xeon cores can be fully utilized.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.6xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz and 48.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, it relies on an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows strong memory performance, with a Passmark memory score in the top 25% and a cached read-only bandwidth of 1,393.48 GB/sec. The instance delivers 23.87 million Redis SET operations per second and a static web serving throughput of 18.51 GB/sec. With a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation, this server is designed for compute-intensive tasks such as software compilation, web serving, and medium-scale model inference.

tagline: A dedicated 24-core compute-optimized server featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processors and strong memory bandwidth for intensive processing workloads.

48.0 GB of RAM providing a 2.0 GB per core resource density
